sourceSelector.emptyDescription: If you just granted screen recording permission, reload this picker. On macOS you may need to reopen OpenStream.
sourceSelector.loadFailedDescription: OpenStream could not load capture sources. Reload this picker and try again.

systemLanguagePrompt.title: Usar o idioma do seu sistema?
